nasb.text: “Then we turned and went up the road to Bashan, and Og, king of Bashan, with all his people came out to meet us in battle at Edrei.

esv.text: “Then we turned and went up the way to Bashan. And Og the king of Bashan came out against us, he and all his people, to battle at Edrei.

cnv.text: “後來我們回轉過來，沿著到巴珊的路上去；巴珊王噩和他的眾民，都出來迎著我們，在以得來與我們作戰。

ccb.text: “之后，我们前往巴珊，巴珊王噩率全军在以得来迎战我们。
